OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Zerga Brokov
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rance Hightower, is present.
Attorney, Teresa Lynn Friend , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Feinstein, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 201, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
